mapper.select: select distinct grp.project_id from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id is not null and grp.feishu_story_id != '' and grp.project_id is not null and grp.project_id != ''

select mss.story_id as id, mss.story_name as name from spotter_efficiency.meego_story_stats mss inner join ( select grp.feishu_story_id from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id is not null and grp.feishu_story_id != '' group by grp.feishu_story_id ) linked on linked.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = mss.story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci order by mss.updated_at desc

select mss.story_id as id, mss.story_name as name from spotter_efficiency.meego_story_stats mss where 1=1
and ( mss.story_id like concat('%', #{keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') or mss.story_name like concat('%', #{keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') )
order by mss.updated_at desc limit 50

select mss.story_id as id, mss.story_name as name from spotter_efficiency.meego_story_stats mss where mss.story_id in
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select tp.id as planId, tpfc.functional_case_id as caseId, coalesce(trim(fc.name), '') as caseName, sum(coalesce(tpcm.exec_count, 0)) as execCountSum, sum(coalesce(tpcm.total_time_ms, 0)) as totalTimeMs, sum(coalesce(cer.exec_duration, 0)) as totalDurationMsFromCer, sum(case when cer.exec_duration is not null and cer.exec_duration > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as durationPositiveCount, max(cer.exec_duration) as maxDurationMs, sum(case when cer.exec_result in ('SUCCESS','PASS') then 1 else 0 end) as successCountRecord, sum(case when cer.exec_result is not null and cer.exec_result != '' and cer.exec_result not in ('SUCCESS','PASS') then 1 else 0 end) as failCountRecord, substring_index(group_concat(tpcm.last_exec_result order by tpcm.update_time desc), ',', 1) as lastExecResultMetrics, max(tpfc.last_exec_result) as lastExecResultTpfc from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = grp.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and tp.type COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT('TEST_PLAN' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tp.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci left join spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics tpcm on tpcm.test_plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tp.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpfc.functional_case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci left join spotter_efficiency.case_execution_record cer on cer.plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tp.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and cer.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpfc.functional_case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci left join functional_case fc on fc.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpfc.functional_case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and fc.deleted = 0 where grp.type COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT('GROUP' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci group by tp.id, tpfc.functional_case_id, coalesce(trim(fc.name), '') order by tp.id, execCountSum desc, caseId

select cer.executor_id as executorId, count(*) as caseCount from spotter_efficiency.case_execution_record cer inner join ( select tp.id as plan_id, tpfc.functional_case_id as case_id from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci ) plan_case on cer.plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = plan_case.plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and cer.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = plan_case.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci inner join ( select plan_id, case_id, min(create_time) as first_time from spotter_efficiency.case_execution_record group by plan_id, case_id ) first_t on first_t.plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = cer.plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and first_t.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = cer.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and first_t.first_time = cer.create_time where cer.executor_id is not null and cer.executor_id != '' group by cer.executor_id order by caseCount desc

select tpcm.block_reason as reasonCode, count(*) as count from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id inner join spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics tpcm on tpcm.test_plan_id = tp.id and tpcm.case_id = tpfc.functional_case_id where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and tpcm.block_reason is not null and trim(tpcm.block_reason) != '' group by tpcm.block_reason order by count desc

select ccl.change_reason as reasonCode, count(*) as count from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id inner join spotter_efficiency.case_change_log ccl on ccl.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpfc.functional_case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci group by ccl.change_reason order by count desc

select date_format(from_unixtime(cer.exec_start_time / 1000), '%Y-%m-%d') as execDate, sum(case when cer.exec_result in ('SUCCESS','PASS') then 1 else 0 end) as passed, sum(case when cer.exec_result is not null and cer.exec_result != '' and cer.exec_result not in ('SUCCESS','PASS','BLOCKED') then 1 else 0 end) as failed, sum(case when cer.exec_result = 'BLOCKED' then 1 else 0 end) as blocked from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id inner join spotter_efficiency.case_execution_record cer on cer.plan_id = tp.id and cer.case_id = tpfc.functional_case_id where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and cer.exec_start_time is not null and cer.exec_start_time >= (unix_timestamp() - 30 * 86400) * 1000 group by date_format(from_unixtime(cer.exec_start_time / 1000), '%Y-%m-%d') order by execDate

select coalesce(nullif(trim(fccf.value), ''), 'P2') as reasonCode, count(*) as count from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id inner join functional_case fc on fc.id = tpfc.functional_case_id and fc.deleted = 0 left join functional_case_custom_field fccf on fccf.case_id = fc.id left join custom_field cf on cf.id = fccf.field_id and cf.name = 'functional_priority' and cf.scene = 'FUNCTIONAL' and (cf.internal = 1 or cf.internal = true) where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci group by coalesce(nullif(trim(fccf.value), ''), 'P2') order by field(reasonCode, 'P0', 'P1', 'P2', 'P3')

select (select count(distinct tpfc2.functional_case_id) from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp2 inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp2 on tp2.group_id = grp2.id and tp2.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc2 on tpfc2.test_plan_id = tp2.id where grp2.type = 'GROUP' and grp2.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci ) as totalCaseCount, (select count(*) from ( select tpfc.functional_case_id from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id left join spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics tpcm on tpcm.test_plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tp.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpfc.functional_case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci left join spotter_efficiency.case_metrics_detail cmd on cmd.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci group by tpfc.functional_case_id having max(cmd.case_source_type) in ('REUSE','COPY') ) reused_cases) as reusedCaseCount, coalesce(sum(t.cs_score), 0) as totalCsTotal, coalesce(sum(case when t.case_source_type in ('REUSE','COPY') then t.cs_score else 0 end), 0) as reusedCsTotal, coalesce(sum( case when t.case_source_type in ('REUSE','COPY') then coalesce(nullif(t.saved_write_ms, 0), t.algo_expected_write_ms) else 0 end ), 0) as absoluteTimeSavingsMs from ( select tpfc.functional_case_id, max(cmd.cs_score) as cs_score, max(cmd.case_source_type) as case_source_type, max(cmd.saved_write_ms) as saved_write_ms, max(cmd.algo_expected_write_ms) as algo_expected_write_ms from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id left join spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics tpcm on tpcm.test_plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tp.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpfc.functional_case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci left join spotter_efficiency.case_metrics_detail cmd on cmd.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci group by tpfc.functional_case_id ) t

select cmd.complexity_level as complexity_level, coalesce(sum(cmd.algo_expected_write_ms), 0) as expected_write_ms, coalesce(sum(cmd.algo_expected_exec_ms), 0) as expected_exec_ms from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics tpcm on tp.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpcm.test_plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci inner join spotter_efficiency.case_metrics_detail cmd on tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = cmd.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and cmd.complexity_level is not null and cmd.complexity_level != '' group by cmd.complexity_level

select coalesce(round(mss.test_analysis_time * 8 * 60), 0) from spotter_efficiency.meego_story_stats mss where mss.story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and mss.test_analysis_time is not null and mss.test_analysis_time > 0 limit 1

select coalesce(sum(tpm.total_actual_exec_ms), 0) from spotter_efficiency.test_plan_metrics tpm inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tpm.test_plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tp.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci where tp.group_id in ( select grp.id from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci ) and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN'

select null as avgUqsScore, (select count(*) from ( select distinct cer.plan_id, cer.case_id from spotter_efficiency.case_execution_record cer inner join ( select tp.id as plan_id, tpfc.functional_case_id as case_id from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci ) plan_case on cer.plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = plan_case.plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and cer.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = plan_case.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci inner join ( select plan_id, case_id, min(create_time) as first_time from spotter_efficiency.case_execution_record group by plan_id, case_id ) first_t on first_t.plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = cer.plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and first_t.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = cer.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and first_t.first_time = cer.create_time where cer.exec_result in ('SUCCESS','PASS') ) fp ) as firstPassCount, (select count(*) from ( select distinct cer.plan_id, cer.case_id from spotter_efficiency.case_execution_record cer inner join ( select tp.id as plan_id, tpfc.functional_case_id as case_id from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci ) plan_case on cer.plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = plan_case.plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and cer.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = plan_case.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci ) tot ) as totalExecutedCount

select (select count(distinct tpcm.case_id) from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id inner join spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics tpcm on tpcm.test_plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tp.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpfc.functional_case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and tpcm.exec_count > 0 ) as total_exec_cases, (select COALESCE(SUM(tpm.total_defect_count), 0) from spotter_efficiency.test_plan_metrics tpm where tpm.test_plan_id in ( select distinct tp.id from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id inner join spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics tpcm on tpcm.test_plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tp.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpfc.functional_case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci ) ) as total_defects, (select coalesce(sum(tpcm.exec_count), 0) from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id inner join spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics tpcm on tpcm.test_plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tp.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpfc.functional_case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci ) as total_exec_count, (select count(distinct tpcm.case_id) from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id inner join spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics tpcm on tpcm.test_plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tp.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpfc.functional_case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and (tpcm.is_blocked_run = 0 or tpcm.is_blocked_run is null) and tpcm.last_exec_result = 'SUCCESS' ) as success_without_block_count

select (select count(distinct tpfc.functional_case_id) from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id inner join ( select tp2.id as plan_id, min(cer.exec_start_time) as first_exec_time from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp2 inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp2 on tp2.group_id = grp2.id and tp2.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_efficiency.case_execution_record cer on cer.plan_id = tp2.id where grp2.type = 'GROUP' and grp2.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci group by tp2.id ) pfe on pfe.plan_id = tp.id where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and tpfc.create_time > pfe.first_exec_time ) as new_case_count, (select count(distinct tpfc.functional_case_id) from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci ) as total_case_count, (select count(distinct tpfc.functional_case_id) from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id inner join spotter_efficiency.case_change_log ccl on ccl.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpfc.functional_case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and (ccl.change_reason is null or ccl.change_reason != 'CASE_COPY') where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci ) as modified_case_count

select coalesce(sum(tpcm.total_time_ms), 0) as total_duration_ms, coalesce(sum(tpcm.exec_count), 0) as total_exec_count, sum(case when tpcm.exec_count >= 3 then coalesce(cmd.cs_score, 0) else 0 end) as high_freq_cs_total, sum(coalesce(cmd.cs_score, 0)) as all_exec_cs_total from spotter_aegis.test_plan grp inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan tp on tp.group_id = grp.id and tp.type = 'TEST_PLAN' inner join spotter_aegis.test_plan_functional_case tpfc on tpfc.test_plan_id = tp.id inner join spotter_efficiency.test_plan_case_metrics tpcm on tpcm.test_plan_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tp.id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci and tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpfc.functional_case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci left join spotter_efficiency.case_metrics_detail cmd on cmd.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = tpcm.case_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci where grp.type = 'GROUP' and grp.feishu_story_id COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci = CONVERT(#{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci

select coalesce(sum(case when endpoint_type = 'FRONTEND' then ifnull(loc_valid, 0) else 0 end), 0) as frontendLocChanged, coalesce(sum(case when endpoint_type = 'BACKEND' then ifnull(loc_valid, 0) else 0 end), 0) as backendLocChanged, count(distinct pipeline_id) as deployTotalCount, count(distinct case when (ifnull(is_rollback, 0) = 1 or ifnull(is_hotfix, 0) = 1) then pipeline_id end) as deployFailureCount, max(deploy_time) as lastDeployTime from spotter_efficiency.requirement_change_stats where story_id = #{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update spotter_efficiency.meego_story_stats set frontend_loc_changed = #{frontendLocChanged,jdbcType=INTEGER}, backend_loc_changed = #{backendLocChanged,jdbcType=INTEGER}, deploy_total_count = #{deployTotalCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, deploy_failure_count = #{deployFailureCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_deploy_time = #{lastDeployTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, change_failure_rate = #{changeFailureRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where story_id = #{storyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
